data.title: Desert Control Ramps Up U.S. Pilots and Launches USD 15m Financing Review
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Desert Control AS ( (DE:8KT) ) has shared an update.

Desert Control AS has completed an application of its Liquid Natural Clay technology at Berkeley Country Club in El Cerrito, California, underscoring growing U.S. traction as the company ramps up to 26 pilot projects in the first half of 2026 across both familiar and new crop types. Compared with seven pilots in 2025, this expansion signals a rapid commercial scale-up that could strengthen the company’s position in water-saving agritech markets.

To support this growth, the board has launched a financing review targeting about USD 15 million through potential equity, debt, or strategic funding, with MW&L Capital Partners appointed as financial adviser and Advokatfirmaet Selmer AS as legal counsel. Proceeds are intended to fund commercialization, U.S. sales expansion, next-generation production capacity, and broader corporate and R&D needs, as Desert Control aims to secure funding before its cash runway ends in September 2026 and prepares a Capital Markets Day to outline strategy and long-term growth plans.

More about Desert Control AS

Desert Control AS is a soil and water conservation technology company that develops solutions to enhance soil health, conserve water, and promote ecosystem resilience. Its proprietary Liquid Natural Clay (LNC) transforms sandy, fast-draining soils to better retain water and nutrients, targeting agriculture, forests, and green landscapes to improve yields and sustainability.

Average Trading Volume: 479,041

Current Market Cap: NOK177.9M

For a thorough assessment of 8KT stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: BioArctic Showcases Leqembi Momentum and BrainTransporter Deals in 2025 Report
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from BioArctic AB Class B ( ($SE:BIOA.B) ).

BioArctic’s 2025 Annual and Sustainability Report highlights a year defined by the commercial and clinical progress of Leqembi, described as the world’s first disease-modifying treatment for Alzheimer’s disease and now approved in more than 50 countries, alongside continued work on new treatment forms and a launch in the Nordic region. The company also underscores the strategic importance of its BrainTransporter platform, now backed by three agreements with global pharmaceutical partners, and outlines a growth strategy focused on expanding its antibody field, increasing drug bioavailability in the brain, and driving long-term value creation through sustainability, risk management and robust corporate governance structures.

The report emphasizes BioArctic’s ambition to remain an attractive partner and workplace while integrating environmental, social and governance priorities into its operations to support sustainable innovation in brain disease treatments. It details how management, including CEO Gunilla Osswald and Chief R&D Officer Johanna Fälting, view the company’s expanding project portfolio and technology platforms as central to strengthening its competitive position in the biopharmaceutical landscape and offering stakeholders exposure to emerging therapies in a rapidly evolving neurodegenerative disease market.

More about BioArctic AB Class B

BioArctic AB is a Swedish biotechnology company focused on developing antibody-based therapies for neurodegenerative brain diseases, particularly Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s. Its portfolio centers on antibodies targeting misfolded proteins such as amyloid-beta, alpha-synuclein and TDP-43, complemented by its BrainTransporter technology to enhance delivery of biologic drugs into the brain. The company also builds value through partnerships with global pharmaceutical firms and maintains a strong patent portfolio supporting its innovation-driven strategy.

Average Trading Volume: 189,522

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK30.02B

For an in-depth examination of BIOA.B stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: Northfield Bancorp Swings to Profit in First Quarter
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Northfield Bancorp ( (NFBK) ) just unveiled an update.

Northfield Bancorp reported a sharp turnaround in its first-quarter 2026 results, released on April 20, 2026, posting net income of $11.8 million, or $0.30 per diluted share, versus a net loss of $27.4 million in the prior quarter and $7.9 million in the first quarter of 2025. The rebound reflected the absence of last quarter’s $41 million goodwill impairment, stronger net interest income driven by wider margins and lower funding costs, and a lower provision for credit losses, partially offset by higher merger-related and compensation expenses.

Net interest income rose to $37.0 million and net interest margin improved to 2.76% as yields on loans and mortgage-backed securities increased and the cost of interest-bearing liabilities fell, aided by a shift toward lower-cost deposits. Core deposits excluding brokered balances expanded by $83.3 million while loan balances, mainly in multifamily credits, declined by $48.8 million, asset quality remained solid with non-performing loans at 0.56% of total loans, and the board declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.13 per common share payable on May 20, 2026, as the company advanced planning for its pending merger with Columbia Financial.

The most recent analyst rating on (NFBK) stock is a Hold with a $14.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Northfield Bancorp stock, see the NFBK Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NFBK Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NFBK is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by sharply weaker 2025 profitability and higher leverage, plus an extremely high P/E that reflects depressed earnings. Partly offsetting these are improved operating cash flow, a moderate upward technical trend (price above key longer-term averages), and corporate events that include a potentially favorable acquisition backdrop alongside impairment-driven volatility.

To see Spark’s full report on NFBK stock, click here.

More about Northfield Bancorp

Northfield Bancorp, Inc., the holding company for Northfield Bank, operates as a community-focused banking institution based in Woodbridge, N.J., and is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker NFBK. The bank provides a range of deposit products, loans – including multifamily and commercial real estate lending – and related financial services, with a funding mix that emphasizes low-cost core deposits over higher-cost certificates and borrowings.

Average Trading Volume: 354,365

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $586.4M

data.title: Lime Technologies Boosts Dividend, Board Strength and Capital Flexibility at AGM
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Lime Technologies AB ( (SE:LIME) ).

Shareholders in Lime Technologies AB approved the 2025 financial statements at the annual general meeting and agreed on a dividend of SEK 4.50 per share, to be distributed in two installments later in 2026. The board and former CEO were discharged from liability, the remuneration report was approved, and board fees were increased, reflecting confidence in governance and corporate performance.

The meeting re-elected five directors, added Dynavox chief executive Fredrik Ruben to the board, and confirmed Erik Syrén as chairman, strengthening leadership with additional software growth expertise. Shareholders also renewed mandates for share buybacks and new share issues of up to 10 percent of outstanding stock, giving the board greater flexibility for capital allocation and funding future growth opportunities amid volatile equity markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:LIME) stock is a Hold with a SEK410.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lime Technologies AB stock, see the SE:LIME Stock Forecast page.

More about Lime Technologies AB

Lime Technologies AB is a Swedish public company that develops and delivers software with a strong focus on business development. The company operates in the broader software industry, targeting growth-oriented customers and emphasizing digital tools that support sales and customer relationship processes.

data.title: SAP SE Sets Virtual 2026 AGM, Proposes €2.50 Dividend and New Capital Measures
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from SAP AG ( (SAP) ).

SAP SE has convened its 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders for May 5, 2026, to be held as a virtual-only event in accordance with German stock corporation law, with shareholders participating remotely rather than in person. The agenda covers the presentation of already approved 2025 financial statements, a proposed dividend of €2.50 per share from 2025 retained earnings, allocation of additional reserves, discharge of the Executive and Supervisory Boards, appointment of auditors and sustainability-report auditors for 2026, approval of the 2025 compensation report, renewal and expansion of authorization to issue convertible and warrant-linked instruments with new contingent capital, amendments to enable electronic share issuance, and elections to the Supervisory Board, together signaling continued refinement of SAP’s capital structure, governance and shareholder engagement mechanisms.

The most recent analyst rating on (SAP) stock is a Buy with a $256.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SAP AG stock, see the SAP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SAP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SAP is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial quality (high margins, improving profitability, conservative leverage, and solid free-cash-flow conversion) and a supportive earnings outlook (record backlog, margin expansion, and ~€10B 2026 free cash flow target plus a €10B buyback). These positives are meaningfully offset by weak technicals (price far below major moving averages with bearish momentum) and a relatively high P/E that limits valuation support.

To see Spark’s full report on SAP stock, click here.

More about SAP AG

SAP SE is a Germany-based global enterprise software company that develops and sells applications and cloud services for business process management, including ERP, finance, supply chain and analytics solutions. The group primarily serves corporate and public-sector customers worldwide, positioning itself as a leading provider of enterprise application software and related technologies.

data.title: Yakkyo’s Majority Shareholder Sets Single Slates for New Board and Auditors
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Yakkyo S.P.A. ( (IT:YKY) ) has shared an update.

Yakkyo S.p.A., an Italian innovative SME specializing in AI‑based software for dropshipping and wholesale e‑commerce via its Yakkyofy platform, manages global procurement, storage and logistics for online merchants and offers the Pandarocket.ai suite to automate pricing, product content, media editing and marketing campaigns. The company targets greater efficiency and accessibility in e‑commerce by centralizing order management, shipment tracking and returns handling while providing access to a vast product catalogue and customized solutions.

Ahead of a shareholders’ meeting scheduled for 27 April 2026, Yakkyo announced that a single list of candidates for its Board of Directors has been submitted by majority shareholder Camila S.r.l., which holds 61.92% of the company’s share capital. Camila S.r.l. also proposed a single list for the Board of Statutory Auditors, signalling continuity and tight governance control by the main shareholder, and the candidate lists and related documentation have been made publicly available through the company and Borsa Italiana’s information channels.

More about Yakkyo S.P.A.

Yakkyo S.p.A. is an Italian innovative SME that provides integrated software solutions for dropshipping and wholesale e‑commerce, operating via its proprietary Yakkyofy technology platform. The company focuses on automating procurement, storage and logistics worldwide, and has expanded into AI‑driven tools such as Pandarocket.ai to optimize online sales, marketing campaigns and content creation for a global catalogue of over 21 million products.

Through Yakkyofy, Yakkyo’s clients can manage purchasing, selling and shipping processes end‑to‑end from a single interface, including real‑time order tracking and streamlined returns and refunds. Its AI‑based solutions aim to make e‑commerce more efficient and accessible, allowing customers to focus on sales and marketing while benefiting from customized operational support and automation.

Average Trading Volume: 46,603

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €7.03M

data.description:

The latest update is out from Legal & General ( (GB:LGEN) ).

Legal & General has disclosed a transaction by Group Chief Financial Officer and director Andrew Kail involving the exercise of a performance share plan award granted in April 2021. The award became exercisable following the end of a two-year holding period tied to performance conditions linked to the company’s 2023 financial results.

Kail exercised options over 426,166 ordinary shares at nil cost on 20 April 2026, subsequently selling 204,858 shares at £2.707991 each to cover tax and dealing expenses and retaining 221,308 shares. The disclosure, made under UK Market Abuse Regulation, underscores ongoing alignment between executive remuneration and shareholder interests through equity-based incentives.

data.title: Fuller’s Buys Back 15,000 Shares, Updates Voting Rights Count
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Fuller Smith & Turner ( (GB:FSTA) ) has shared an announcement.

Fuller, Smith & Turner has repurchased 15,000 of its “A” Ordinary Shares of 40p each on the London Stock Exchange as part of its ongoing share buyback programme, paying a volume-weighted average price of 669.5p per share. The shares will be held in treasury, reflecting the company’s continued use of capital management tools to adjust its equity base.

Following this transaction, Fuller’s listed issued share capital stands at 36,446,686 “A” Ordinary Shares, of which 5,088,233 are held in treasury, leaving 31,358,453 voting shares in circulation. The updated voting rights figure provides shareholders and the market with a new denominator for regulatory disclosure thresholds, ensuring transparency around significant holdings and changes in ownership.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:FSTA) stock is a Buy with a £1250.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fuller Smith & Turner stock, see the GB:FSTA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FSTA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FSTA is a Outperform.

Fuller Smith & Turner demonstrates strong technical momentum and positive corporate actions, which are the most significant factors driving the score. Financial performance is solid, though improvements in free cash flow and return on equity could enhance the outlook. Valuation is fair, providing a balanced risk-reward profile.

To see Spark’s full report on FSTA stock, click here.

Fuller, Smith & Turner P.L.C., commonly known as Fuller’s, is a U.K.-listed company whose primary securities are “A” Ordinary Shares traded on the London Stock Exchange.
